top_signals.title: Former Governors Team Up to Address AI Job Losses
top_signals.summary: Former Indiana Governor Eric Holcomb (R) says he is co-chairing an organization called RAISE US that is aimed at easing the American workforce’s transition to an artificial intelligence-based economy. Speaking to Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg Businessweek, Holcomb explains that gaining support from big tech and leading AI companies like Amazon, Anthropic and Microsoft shows that shared commitment to preparing workers for AI-driven jobs.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: The decoy effect — how Beijing steers western mining capital
top_signals.summary: By periodically rattling the sabre of export restrictions, Beijing deliberately keeps geopolitical anxieties at a boil, Nicholas Vafeas writes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: How myMechanic is digitizing fleet roadside repairs
top_signals.summary:
myMechanic’s Dealer-Connect bridges the gap between telematics alerts and slow roadside execution, replacing phone handoffs with orchestrated digital dispatch and updates.

The post How myMechanic is digitizing fleet roadside repairs appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump Tariff Defeat Is Market Tailwind ‘No One Is Talking About’
top_signals.summary: The sweeping tariffs underpinning President Donald Trump’s economic policy may have gone from a headwind to a tailwind for the stock market, with the Supreme Court’s decision to unwind them setting the stage for a potential earnings boon for some companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
